fcba.a1_not_authorized.statement: The extension of credit was not made to a person with authority to use the consumer's credit card or open-end credit plan.

fcba.a2_not_per_1026_7.statement: The extension of credit is not identified in accordance with the requirements of section 1026.7(a)(2) or (b)(2) as applicable.

fcba.a3_extension_property_services.statement: The reflection on the periodic statement is of an extension of credit for property.
The reflection on the periodic statement is of an extension of credit for services.

fcba.a3_not_accepted.statement: The property or services were not accepted by the consumer's party.

fcba.a3_not_delivered.statement: The property or services were not delivered to the consumer's party as agreed.

fcba.a4_failure_to_credit.statement: The periodic statement reflects the creditor's failure to credit properly a payment to the consumer's account.

fcba.a5_computational_error.statement: The periodic statement reflects a computational error of an accounting nature made by the creditor.

fcba.a7_failure_to_deliver_statement.statement: The creditor failed to deliver a periodic statement to the consumer.
